/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -DNDEBUG   CMakeFiles/test.dir/decode/autf8.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/decode/base64.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/decode/beastSound.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/decode/binary.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/decode/edcrypt.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/decode/zhtopy.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/fft/fft.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/method/bindkernel.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/sql/baseSqlite3.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/sql/sqlite3.c.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/main.cpp.o  -o test  -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/d/work/vscode/cmake/buildlinux/log: log/liblog.so -ldl -lpthread
